loginSubtitle: Log in to access your saved calculations
googleError: Google login is temporarily unavailable. Please use email and password instead.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
resetRequestFailed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
resetEmailSent: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox and spam folder.
invalidResetLinkDescription: This password reset link is missing or malformed. Please request a new one.
setNewPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account
resetFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordResetSuccessDescription: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.
